comment: Bridge from Swagbound narrative string flags to EarthBound numeric event flags (names from ebsrc, ids in content/rom-truth/event-flags.json). When the runtime sets a story flag, it also sets the mapped EB flags, which drives the vanilla flag machinery the converter carried over: NPC appear/disappear (world.json npcs eventFlag+showSprite), encounter-table gating (encounters.json), and later doors. 'ebFlags' are adopted now; 'candidates' need in-browser semantics verification before promotion.

entries.beat: Card Clique beaten at the MONS LINK arcade (EB: Frank)
Returnless King beaten at the relay gate (EB: Captain Strong / roadblock)

candidates.name: FLG_ONET_COPA_DISAPPEAR
candidates.note: roadblock cop line A-E; verify which cops these hide before adopting

entries.beat: Malady beaten at the first threshold (EB: Titanic Ant / Giant Step); Morningside dawns

candidates.name: FLG_STEP_ONET
candidates.note: sanctuary-step recorded; adopt with the Attestation-anchor proposal

candidates.name: FLG_POLA_GRFD
candidates.note: post-rescue town-state flag; verify what it changes in Twoson/Postwick

entries.beat: Milady falls; the post-win world state
Wake-in-bed opening finished; the meteor-night containment lifts (gawker crowd departs, the 35 when-unset town-seal doors deactivate, the yard band becomes the road)

candidates.name: FLG_MYHOME_START
candidates.note: house-cast state machine; verify MYHOME_* semantics in-browser before adopting
